speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys are climbing, you see The Mistake is now being led over towards shore. You make your way to the top of the deck, and as you come across, one by one, you see there waiting for you is about ten figures, all in various scattered bits of seafaring attire, leathers and billowing cloths that seem to have seen many a journey out here on the open Lucidian Ocean. Immediately, your attention is grabbed by the central figure, a female elf, with light brown skin, with red, wild hair that falls in clustered strings around her face and down the back. You see she's wearing a long, sleeveless gray coat with a high collar that bends at the edge of the shoulders, with a thick scarf around her neck. You see she has heavy elbow-length gloves and knee-high boots that look weathered with use and probably brutality. They are stained in places where that could only have been acquired by meeting the face of somebody else. As you step up, she has her arms crossed in front of her, cocks her head to the side and looks to you specifically and goes, (french accent) "Well hello, Captain. You have returned from your journey, Jawgrasp?"
trigger_phrase: You make your way to the top

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Coming out of the gun port? [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I'm so proud of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Travis, you look really hot. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (mocking) Ha ha. You're so pretty!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From the gun ports on the gun deck or the tween deck, as it's sometimes called. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Anyway, so, as you make your way towards this massive ship, the large rope-- I want to say a ladder more than a giant net-looking ladder, is thrown over the side that hits and breaks the surface for a bit so that it floats. The boats come up to the side and the older woman is inside the boat, gives a look to the rest of you and goes, "After you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Arr.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll go first.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think it's women and children first that are supposed to go, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, that's not right at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You'll go first, Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Yep, I mean, yes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: There you go. While that's happening, Fjord, you make your way to the captain's quarters.
trigger_phrase: you make your way to the captain

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Whoa.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We can use it to blow shit up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing. Are we going to blow up the ship?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We could. I found out that there's lots of black powder downstairs. If we wanted to make a getaway or something, we could go in, set it off, blow it up. Everyone would die, yeah! [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would you do me a favor, just as a rule, maybe keep that ten feet away from me, please?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh sorry, Caleb, yes. Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's useful, just you know, oil and water.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You are a walking hazard right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I just had the itch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, look, I'm not shaming you for that. I'm just saying maybe we should put the black powder in the haversack.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, give it to me, that's smart. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the ocean fires up like a spire, a pillar of solid ocean water. The ships are scattered in different directions, as it slams them down once more, scattering them into thousands of pieces of splintered wood.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I take both hands and do a coup de grace, two big (crashing) over the top?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The center of the ocean parts, giving this slight vacuum. This dual-sided, abyssal crevice in the center of the ocean. On the opposite ends of where your hands rise, you watch the waves rise up and in one fell sweep, two solid crystalline walls of water slam together and then even out. As the ripples subside, all you can see are the thousands and thousands of glittering shards of what once were that armada.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Moses shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't wake up, don't wake up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As the rest of you come to consciousness in the morning, Fjord seems to be sleeping in a little bit before suddenly shooting up with a gasp.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I take both hands and do a coup de grace, two big (crashing) over the top?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The center of the ocean parts, giving this slight vacuum. This dual-sided, abyssal crevice in the center of the ocean. On the opposite ends of where your hands rise, you watch the waves rise up and in one fell sweep, two solid crystalline walls of water slam together and then even out. As the ripples subside, all you can see are the thousands and thousands of glittering shards of what once were that armada.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Moses shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't wake up, don't wake up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, another dream with seamen scattered everywhere. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's somehow worse with that outfit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's my people.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Continuing to ascend these steps one by one, they grow more and more narrow. You think you see an approaching surface of some kind. You're clear of the water, suddenly breaking the surface and you're standing in a dark stone chamber. You've managed to get all the way up standing within the ankle high water in the middle of the stone chamber and you watch, as all the liquid begins to drain. Until there's no more water around you. Revealing in the center of this chamber, an intricate circle in the ground, maybe two feet across. Beautiful ancient craftsmanship, detailed to depict a serpent body coiled. Carved eyes emerging from the creature's body every few inches. The center of the water is a circle of water, like a well. "Watching." What do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Witch Bolt, right to its chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the darkened energy arcs from the hilt of your blade, hitting it you watch as the cracks spider up the stone before it detonates into hundreds of shards of dark stone. You see half of the face slowly hit and clatter onto the stone before falling off to the side. Vandren. Do you continue up?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The stairs, are they staying the same, is there anything at the foot of the statue after they break apart?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looking down the statue itself is now immaterial. You've entirely annihilated it and you glance over the side, and what few shards still remain, slowly drift beyond your view into the dark abyss below.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll move forward.
